name: Frostmoon Enclave
title: Frostmoon Enclave
desc: Here, the Frostmoon Scions gather, listening to the teachings of moonlight.

skills.desc:
When played: Draw 2 cards, heal the character on your team who has taken the most DMG for 2 HP.
End Phase: Attach Cost Reduction to 2 random cards with Current Elemental Dice Cost greater than 0 in your Hand.
Usage(s): 2
